title: SOUTH LANE CHILDREN'S DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: SOUTH LANE SCHOOL DISTRICT SOUTH LANE CHILDREN'S DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency, comprehensive, and preventive dental services. 455 Adams Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Children grades K-12 who are uninsured Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 942-3383 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-3383 Dental Care Coordinator Courtney Long [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Creswell, Crow-Applegate-Lorane, South Lane, and North Douglas School Districts Services: Dental Hygiene Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry School Readiness Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH LANE SCHOOL DISTRICT
